message:
✨ Unified project tree sidebar with expandable sections (#1239)

Replace the flat project links + separate nav tree with a unified
sidebar tree where every project (KubeStellar, Console, MCP) is an
expandable section showing its full doc structure inline. Legacy
projects (A2A, KubeFlex, Multi Plugin) are grouped under a collapsible
"Legacy" section, each with their own expandable doc tree.

- KubeStellar, Console, MCP each render as top-level collapsible
  sections with their full page tree inside
- Legacy group contains A2A, KubeFlex, Multi Plugin as sub-trees
- Contributing, Community, News appear below a separator
- Active project auto-expands; others collapse on initial load
- Remove RelatedProjects dependency from sidebar navigation

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
